title: Burst Balloons Maximum Coins
hints: Consider the order in which balloons are burst. Instead of picking the first one to burst, think about which balloon is the LAST one to burst in a given range.
This suggests a dynamic programming approach on intervals. Define a state dp[i][j] representing the max coins obtained by bursting all balloons strictly between indices i and j.
To compute dp[i][j], iterate through every possible last balloon k in the range. The coins earned are nums[i]*nums[k]*nums[j] plus the optimal results from the left and right sub-ranges.
